description: Layer 4 invokes Bourgain-Gamburd property (tau) with an unspecified uniform constant c and gives no quantitative lower bound on d required for the sieve error term to be overpowered. The statement is non-effective and cannot be checked.
action_taken: Bourgain-Gamburd-Sarnak prove property (tau) exists but give no explicit constant. Making it effective for this specific semigroup is an open research problem. Two paths: (1) explicit spectral gap via Breuillard-Green-Tao approximate groups (requires expert), (2) extend brute-force verification high enough to bypass (currently at 2.1e11, would need ~10^15). Neither is feasible short-term. Flagged for MathOverflow/collaborator.
